query: garish toxic color combination unsettling photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — garish toxic color combinations, unsettling palettes

response.objective_caption: A figure with blue hair and glasses wearing a pink blazer and blue plaid skirt lies on dense green foliage, viewed from directly above. The figure reaches one arm toward the camera. White substance covers the face, with red markings on the forehead and around the mouth, and similar red marks are visible on the legs.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A figure with blue hair and glasses wearing a pink blazer and blue plaid skirt lies on dense green foliage in a high-angle shot with obstructed cropping that cuts off the reaching hand and lower legs. A sickly green and pale-blue color cast gives the skin and surroundings an unhealthy, contaminated appearance. White substance smeared across the face with red markings on the forehead and around the mouth, along with similar red marks on the legs, creates a visually repulsive effect that evokes dread and unease.
